query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: An urban landscape with a bright circular sun positioned in the upper center, flanked by multi-story buildings along the left edge and a taller structure at the upper right. Dark masses occupy the lower portion of the frame, and small points of light appear scattered across the upper left area.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, abstract photograph of an urban landscape dominated by an overexposed sun. The image employs muted, faded tones and crushed, low contrast that creates an oppressive, melancholic atmosphere. Architectural details dissolve into indistinct smears, rendering the buildings and foreground as vague textural masses lacking fine detail. The dreamlike soft focus and washed-out palette evoke atmospheric distress, abandoning representational clarity in favor of mood, texture, and gestural impression.
